title: Foundation Established
description: BethGold Foundation was founded with a mission to empower underserved communities through education, health, and community development.

title: First Community Health Outreach
description: Launched our first free medical checkup drive, reaching over 100 people in a single weekend.

title: Education Program Expansion
description: Scaled the School Materials Donation program to reach students across multiple schools and communities.

title: Youth Empowerment Launch
description: Introduced vocational skills training for young people, equipping graduates with practical, income-generating skills.

title: 5 Communities and Growing
description: Reached our current milestone of supporting 5 communities directly, with new partnerships in progress.
